statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name // "default"'); total_input=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); window_size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 0'); used_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$used_pct" ] && [ "$window_size" -gt 0 ]; then total_used=$((total_input + total_output)); printf '%s | %s | Style: %s | Context: %dK/%dK (%.0f%% used)' "$(basename "$cwd")" "$model" "$style" $((total_used / 1000)) $((window_size / 1000)) "$used_pct"; else printf '%s | %s | Style: %s | Context: Ready' "$(basename "$cwd")" "$model" "$style"; fi
